sections.title: Unfair Trade Practice
sections.plain_language: This includes misleading advertisements, false claims about a product, or refusal to issue a bill/receipt.
common_situations: Refusal to refund if product is defective

sections.title: Jurisdiction of District Commission
sections.plain_language: You can file a complaint in the District Commission of your area if the value of goods/services is up to ₹50 lakhs.
